title: aloysia chiapensis
intro: Aloysia chiapensis, also known as Chiapas tea or White Cloud, is a flowering plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Aloysia chiapensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
